name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at how yesterday went at {{orgName}}. A few new faces reached out, some appointments moved through the books, and the day wrapped up without anything needing your urgent attention.

Nothing on fire — just wanted you to start the day with the picture in hand before patients start arriving.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
